compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: any AC-powered solenoid valve CO2 regulator
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers (0-5000 ppm range); day/night scheduling; precision cycle; data logging
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 1 dedicated to CO2 regulator; opens solenoid valve when CO2 drops below setpoint. Requires regulator that auto-activates when AC power is applied (typical solenoid design). Max 1100W combined. Night scheduling disables CO2 injection during dark period.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: AC Infinity CO2 Regulator (with solenoid valve and flow meter)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers (0-5000 ppm); day/night scheduling; cycle; data logging
compatible_devices.notes: AC Infinity's own CO2 Regulator (solenoid valve + gas flow meter, brass construction) is the primary intended pairing device. Sold separately.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Titan Controls CO2 regulators (120V solenoid type)
compatible_devices.notes: Titan Controls cited as compatible by retailer source. Compatibility applies to any 120V auto-start solenoid CO2 regulator. Verify device auto-starts when AC power is applied before purchase.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 level triggers; alternates exhaust fan on when CO2 is excessive; day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Outlet 2 dedicated to exhaust fan; activates to purge CO2 or maintain CO2 setpoint. On/off only; no speed control. Fan must auto-start when powered. Controller alternates regulator and fan to maintain CO2 levels.
